stemHtml:
How can the control law of an autopilot control channel be defined as?
The relationship between the…

options.a: Input and output signals at the amplifier level respectively control deviation data and control deflection signals.
options.b: Crew inputs to the computer and the detector responses (returned to the airplane).
options.c: Computer input deviation data and the signals received by the servoactuators.
options.d: Computer input deviation data and the output control deflection signals.
